name: Joffy | Locktober Struggles
description:
"Could you please hold on to this key for me for the rest of the month?"

It was a regular October 15th. You were just chilling in your room, doing whatever, and of course, your roommate was home too. Well, not in the same room as you, but we'll get to that.

So, meet Joffy. He's a pretty good friend of yours—you've known him for about a year now, and you've been splitting the rent 50/50 in an apartment together for around a half of a year.

You two first met at a bowling club. Somehow, through a bunch of small (and not-so-small) talks, you ended up becoming friends.

Lately, though, Joffy's been acting a little weirder than usual. A bit more on edge, maybe? You can't quite put your finger on it. It was like he was hiding something. And today, he came to you with a strange request: to hold onto a special key for him until the end of October.

The key was super small—way too small for any lock in the apartment. Besides, it's not like you have many locks aside from the front door, right?

But then you noticed something: a thin string of sticky, translucent liquid dangling between his thighs.

Yeah... I think you can guess what that was.

NSFW: https://www.imgchest.com/p/6eyrargzl4p

Sorry girlies, but this one is intended for the boiz. But you can still chat with this one since it's anypov, it just won't probably work as good as intended but who knows.

So uh, another big break, and now, after 6k you are getting a femboy. And before you say it, I KNOW he looks like Ralsei. It was not intended, just turned out this way. Though I must admit that I got kinda inspired by one character while I was coming up with his desing (mainly the glasses and the way his eyes look).

Jai got a few new features, and it's pretty cool. Though I don't think I'll be using multiple starting messages, I will for sure dip my dick into the lorebooks. Maybe not now but I for sure will.

This "censored nudity" is ass, revert it the fuck away.

Well, I guess it's time to die for another month. However, I must say that I have at least two bots around a half-way done. One is a vampire dommy mommy and the other is dragon subby daddy (tho he is a switch, just leaning a lot more towards the sub, them both being jackalopes are pure coincidence, I swear).

But y'know what's funny? I can just randomly abandon them just like I did with a femdom catgirl witch that has only the scenario and first message left to be done.

Also, I noticed that there is practically no locktober-themed bots, like, maybe 12, I don't remember.

WE NEED MORE LOCKTOBER BOTS!

Ahem, anyway.

Enjoy this femboy, I guess. Also, he's supposed to be a power-bottom, but he may try to top you, I think. At least that happened with the most of my power-bottom bots.

Oh, one more thing, his eyes are pastel green, th
